Stakeholder: Cambridge City Council housing and retrofit teams
Data-grounded finding: Pre-1930: 1071 properties; 740 (69.1%) below EPC C; mean score 63.5.
Recommended action: Screen this age group first for fabric, glazing, ventilation and heating-system surveys.

Data-grounded finding: House: 2760 properties; 1274 (46.2%) below EPC C; mean score 69.1.
Recommended action: Target engagement and property-level assessments without treating property type as a direct cause.

Data-grounded finding: Gas: 4073 properties; 1360 (33.4%) below EPC C; mean score 71.7.
Recommended action: Prioritise heating controls, system condition and fabric checks; interpret small fuel groups cautiously.

Data-grounded finding: Leading held-out permutation predictors: WALLS_DESCRIPTION, ROOF_DESCRIPTION, CONSTRUCTION_AGE_GROUP, HOTWATER_DESCRIPTION, BUILT_FORM.
Recommended action: Use these characteristics for screening only; do not replace a qualified EPC or retrofit survey.
